message:
fix(security): correct regex escaping in ACIP version detection

- Fixed double-backslash escaping in detect_version regex pattern
- The pattern was using \\s instead of \s, preventing version matching
- All 50 tests now pass (42 unit + 8 integration)

Also includes:
- feat(core): add skill layering and conflict resolution module
- test(cli): add security scan error path coverage tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
